publishedAbstract: After trying to expand a PVC from the `ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd` storageclass in Filesystem mode, the following error is thrown expansion: ~~~ Ignoring the PVC: didn't find a plugin capable of expanding the volume; waiting for an external controller to process this PVC. ~~~
publishedTitle: PVC expansion fails with the following error: "Ignoring the PVC: didn't find a plugin capable of expanding the volume; waiting for an external controller to process this PVC."`
